title: Extended Foods
description: This mod add foods to the game. The current version has 1 food which is Medium Rare Meat but more will be added soon quickly.
body:
# **What is it?**
Extended Foods gives more food. Currently [Release 1.0.1] Has only 1 food. But more will be coming (Very Quick!)
Mod Features:
Cutting Meat
Cooking Meat
Burning Meat
--More Coming--

**# DO NOT REUPLOAD TO OTHER PLATFORMS (CURSEFORGE, ETC.) WITHOUT MY PERMISSION.**
**TO GET MY PERMISSIONS, DM ME ON DISCORD. @kurby132**
